title: rolloverMB() is in bytes not MB
body: From reading through github issues these past weeks I became aware of rolloverMB() functionality for VCD traces, and it came up this week as a teammate had an error occur at the end of a long sim creating a giant trace file. However, in initial experiments trying to use rolloverMB(), it didn't actually appear that the size we passed in turned out VCD files sized to that many MB. What are the expected units we should be passing in?
